exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your retirement lifestyle forward
items: Calculate your estimated monthly retirement income from all sources including Social Security, pensions, and savings withdrawals
Create a detailed list of your monthly expenses and categorize them as essential vs. discretionary spending
Research and schedule comprehensive health and wellness assessments with your primary care physician, eye doctor, and dentist
Review and update all insurance policies including health, life, disability, and property coverage for retirement needs
Create a detailed daily and weekly schedule template that balances structure with flexibility for your retirement lifestyle
Research and document your Medicare options including enrollment deadlines, supplemental plans, and prescription drug coverage
